criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: Qualitative feedback and reviews provided by users.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Trustpilot

criteria.name: App Features
criteria.description: The range and innovativeness of AI-powered features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech blogs

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features, bug fixes, and improvements.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The design, usability, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert analyses

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The app's handling of user data, privacy policies, and security measures.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, user reviews

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's support for accessibility features like screen readers, text-to-speech, and high contrast modes.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, accessibility reviews, developer documentation

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The app's speed, responsiveness, and resource consumption.
criteria.sources: User reviews, performance benchmarks, technical analyses

criteria.name: Compatibility
criteria.description: The range of devices and operating systems the app supports.
